scripts.download: node -e "require('./src/etl/extractors/downloadhelper').downloadAllSources({ force: false }).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2))).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
scripts.download:force: node -e "require('./src/etl/extractors/downloadhelper').downloadAllSources({ force: true }).then(r => console.log(JSON.stringify(r, null, 2))).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
